metadata.description: AI-optimized plugins by Christian Pedersen (@dkmaker) — architecture patterns and best practices designed for codebases maintained by AI agents. Perfect for non-developers who rely on Claude to write and evolve their code.

plugins.name: vanilla-spa-architecture
plugins.description: Switch from Next.js to a clean React SPA + HTTP API architecture. Gives the AI agent precise DO/DON'T guidance so it produces simple, predictable, AI-maintainable code — no SSR magic, no framework conventions to remember.

plugins.name: customer-benefit-communication
plugins.description: Transform technical, feature-focused customer communication into benefit-driven messages. For IT providers, MSPs, SaaS companies, and any business communicating technical work to non-technical customers. Rewrites emails, proposals, reports, and support replies so customers clearly understand the value they receive.
